testcase.classname: authentication, config and provider branches rejects invalid configuration {"PORT":"0"}
testcase.name: authentication, config and provider branches rejects invalid configuration {"PORT":"0"}

testcase.classname: authentication, config and provider branches rejects invalid configuration {"AUTH_MODE":"nope"}
testcase.name: authentication, config and provider branches rejects invalid configuration {"AUTH_MODE":"nope"}

testcase.classname: authentication, config and provider branches rejects invalid configuration {"AUTH_MODE":"jwt","JWT_SECRET":"short"}

testcase.classname: authentication, config and provider branches rejects invalid configuration {"STORAGE_BACKEND":"x"}

testcase.classname: authentication, config and provider branches rejects invalid configuration {"PROVIDER_MODE":"dashscope","DASHSCOPE_API_KEY":""}
